ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient */,
  "technical_indicators" TEXT /* JSON column to store various technical indicators */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock during the period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Portfolio status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* JSON column to store performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio stock entry */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* JSON column to store performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Watchlist status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist stock entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, trend, analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Report status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* JSON column to store key metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last synchronized */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Data source status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Role status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
